new_articles.title: South Korean government discriminated against Coupang, U.S. companies, House report finds
new_articles.summary: Coupang 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korean government discriminated against Coupang, U.S. companies, House report finds'이다. The House Judiciary Committee said the South Korean government discriminated against Coupang and other U. S. companies, in a new report. " The committee said in the report that Coupang has been the target of discriminatory pressure from the South Korean government that intensified in 2025 after a data breach perpetrated by a disgruntled former employee The result of South Korea's campaign against Coupang has been a more than 40% drop in Coupang's market capitalization , according to the committee, and could have a negative effect on its investors "South Korean regulators have consistently targeted Coupang and subjected the company to hostile regulatory treatment, unfair enforcement practices, and disproportionately large penalties not faced by their Korean competitors," the Judiciary report states "But the situation with Coupang — I have never seen anything this intense In its report, the House Judiciary Committee argued South Korea's actions against Coupang violate the deal. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Don't expect trackers to save your stolen car, experts say
new_articles.summary: Kia 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Don't expect trackers to save your stolen car, experts say'이다. Kia told the BBC UK law prevented its location tracking function being used to live track vehicles. Ian Fogg, a smartphone analyst, said his car was stolen from outside his house in March, but he has not been able to retrieve it - despite the manufacturer, Kia, being able to view its live location via the Kia Connect service He was abroad in March this year when his phone pinged to say he no longer had access to the Kia Connect app On its website Kia Connect advises customers to contact it in the event of a theft Image source, Getty Images "Kia Connect is a customer convenience feature, not a certified security vehicle tracker," the firm told the BBC "Release of location details of a vehicle via Kia Connect is possible, however this must be done in full compliance with all applicable laws, in particular GDPR, and the authorities to minimise risk to the customer. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Krafton settles with Subnautica 2 developer after drawn-out dispute over $250 million
new_articles.summary: Krafton 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Krafton settles with Subnautica 2 developer after drawn-out dispute over $250 million'이다. After a lengthy legal dispute, Krafton has settled with its subsidiary Unknown Worlds Entertainment, which is developing Subnautica 2, and will pay bonuses to the studio's staff, Bloomberg reports. The dispute began last year after Krafton pushed out Unknown Worlds' cofounders, Charlie Cleveland and Max McGuire, and its CEO, Ted Gill, ahead of a potential […]. Krafton settles with Subnautica 2 developer after drawn-out dispute over $250 million All staffers at Unknown Worlds will get bonuses, but CEO Ted Gill is leaving After a lengthy legal dispute, Krafton has settled with its subsidiary Unknown Worlds Entertainment, which is developing Subnautica 2 , and will pay bonuses to the studio’s staff, Bloomberg reports The dispute began last year after Krafton pushed out Unknown Worlds’ cofounders, Charlie Cleveland and Max McGuire, and its CEO, Ted Gill, ahead of a potential $250 million bonus for hitting certain financial goals that would have been shared with the studio Related Subnautica 2 launches soon after lengthy legal dispute Bonuses will be paid to all Unknown Worlds staffers instead of only those who were there when Krafton acquired the studio in 2021 , and they’ll be paid out in three yearly installments, according to Bloomberg ” Krafton didn’t immediately reply to a request for comment from The Verge. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Domestic car sales surge in June on tax cuts, lower interest rates & strong demand
new_articles.summary: Hyundai Motor 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Domestic car sales surge in June on tax cuts, lower interest rates & strong demand'이다. Indian car sales surged over 24% in June, marking a strong third consecutive month of double-digit growth. This boom, fueled by tax cuts and lower interest rates, saw major players like Maruti Suzuki and Tata Motors report significant increases. Despite minor setbacks for Hyundai, the overall automotive sector is experiencing robust demand, with electric vehicle adoption also showing promising trends. Despite minor setbacks for Hyundai, the overall automotive sector is experiencing robust demand, with electric vehicle adoption also showing promising trends Listen to this article in summarized format Loading “We are seeing encouraging growth in EV adoption across segments and the strong momentum in the entry EV category signals rapid mainstreaming of electric mobility across India,” he said Hyundai Motor India , however, posted a 10% drop in sales due to production loss of 13,900 units following a fire at one of its vendor’s facilities which temporarily disrupted operations Tarun Garg, MD & CEO, said normal operations resumed on June 22. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: No console-flation: how the thirst for AI chips is sending games console prices soaring
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'No console-flation: how the thirst for AI chips is sending games console prices soaring'이다. AI datacentres, memory scarcity and factory capacity are costing consumers –and console makers • Don’t get Pushing Buttons delivered to your inbox? Those days may be over. In March, Sony announced a price increase of £90 for the PS5, while last month Microsoft informed gamers that it would be charging at least £75 more for the Xbox Series S and X consoles from August. All three were first released back in 2020. The Switch 2 will also be more expensive globally from September. The main culprit, of course, is AI, or more specifically the exploding demand for semiconductors and memory to power datacentres.
new_articles.original_title: No console-flation: how the thirst for AI chips is sending games console prices soaring
new_articles.original_summary: AI datacentres, memory scarcity and factory capacity are costing consumers –and console makers • Don’t get Pushing Buttons delivered to your inbox? Sign up here It was once a truth universally acknowledged that an ageing console in possession of good revenue must be in line for a price reduction. Those days may be over. In March, Sony announced a price increase of £90 for the PS5, while last month Microsoft informed gamers that it would be charging at least £75 more for the Xbox Series S and X consoles from August. All three were first released back in 2020. The Switch 2 will also be more expensive globally from September. The main culprit, of course, is AI, or more specifically the exploding demand for semiconductors and memory to power datacentres. Console manufacturers could once source these components cheaply, but now they’re in high demand and manufacturers can’t keep up, so deals are being struck. “Initially, the wave of price increases seen in gaming were driven by tariffs imposed by Donald Trump early last year,” says Andy Robinson, editor in chief of gaming news site VGC. “Then, in October, OpenAI announced a deal with Samsung and [Korean chip manufacturer] SK Hynix to acquire a huge portion of their DRAM output for datacentres, causing prices to increase by almost 200%. According to Xbox, those prices have since doubled again, and they’re not expected to come back down any time soon.” Continue reading...
new_articles.company_summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'No console-flation: how the thirst for AI chips is sending games console prices soaring'이다. AI datacentres, memory scarcity and factory capacity are costing consumers –and console makers • Don’t get Pushing Buttons delivered to your inbox? Those days may be over. In March, Sony announced a price increase of £90 for the PS5, while last month Microsoft informed gamers that it would be charging at least £75 more for the Xbox Series S and X consoles from August. All three were first released back in 2020. The Switch 2 will also be more expensive globally from September. The main culprit, of course, is AI, or more specifically the exploding demand for semiconductors and memory to power datacentres.

new_articles.title: Reliance Jio’s IPO set to intensify focus on India’s telco sector amid duopoly fears
new_articles.summary: Hyundai Motor 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Reliance Jio’s IPO set to intensify focus on India’s telco sector amid duopoly fears'이다. Indian telecom giant Reliance Jio’s plan to launch one of the country’s largest public share offerings in recent years is expected to shake up the domestic market and spur digital companies to raise funds amid a lull in the Iran war and global trade tensions. Earlier this month, the company filed its initial public offering plan with the Securities and Exchange Board of India to raise US$3. 8 billion to US$4 billion, potentially surpassing Hyundai Motor India’s record US$3. 3 billion IPO in 2024. . Earlier this month, the company filed its initial public offering plan with the Securities and Exchange Board of India to raise US$3 8 billion to US$4 billion, potentially surpassing Hyundai Motor India’s record US$3 3 billion IPO in 2024 The fund-raising will be used to retire the company’s debts.

Earlier this month, the company filed its initial public offering plan with the Securities and Exchange Board of India to raise US$3.8 billion to US$4 billion, potentially surpassing Hyundai Motor India’s record US$3.3 billion IPO in 2024....

Console manufacturers could once source these components cheaply, but now they’re in high demand and manufacturers can’t keep up, so deals are being struck. “Initially, the wave of price increases seen in gaming were driven by tariffs imposed by Donald Trump early last year,” says Andy Robinson, editor in chief of gaming news site VGC. “Then, in October, OpenAI announced a deal with Samsung and [Korean chip manufacturer] SK Hynix to acquire a huge portion of their DRAM output for datacentres, causing prices to increase by almost 200%. According to Xbox, those prices have since doubled again, and they’re not expected to come back down any time soon.” Continue reading...

matched_articles.title: Vehicle makers maintain positive momentum in June dispatches
matched_articles.summary: Hyundai Motor 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Vehicle makers maintain positive momentum in June dispatches'이다. Maruti, M&M post robust June growth; Hyundai domestic dispatches fall 10% on supply disruption. However, a few automakers bucked the trend; Hyundai Motor India, for instance, saw production hit by a fire at a supplier's facility The PV dispatches in June grew by around 24 per cent to around four-lakh units as compared with 3,21,500 units in the corresponding month last year Utility vehicles maker, Mahindra & Mahindra (M&M) also reported growth of 28 per cent YoY in its domestic wholesales to 60,393 units in June, as compared with 47,306 units in the corresponding month last year However, ‘Creta’ maker Hyundai Motor India (HMIL) reported a decline of 10 per cent YoY in its domestic dispatches to 39,635 units during the month as compared with 44,024 units in June 2025 Tarun Garg, MD and CEO, HMIL, said, the company faced a production loss of 13,900 units owing to a fire incident at one of the supplier’s manufacturing facilities which led to a temporary disruption in production. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Reliance Jio’s IPO set to intensify focus on India’s telco sector amid duopoly fears
matched_articles.summary: Hyundai Motor 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Reliance Jio’s IPO set to intensify focus on India’s telco sector amid duopoly fears'이다. Indian telecom giant Reliance Jio’s plan to launch one of the country’s largest public share offerings in recent years is expected to shake up the domestic market and spur digital companies to raise funds amid a lull in the Iran war and global trade tensions. Earlier this month, the company filed its initial public offering plan with the Securities and Exchange Board of India to raise US$3. 8 billion to US$4 billion, potentially surpassing Hyundai Motor India’s record US$3. 3 billion IPO in 2024. . Earlier this month, the company filed its initial public offering plan with the Securities and Exchange Board of India to raise US$3 8 billion to US$4 billion, potentially surpassing Hyundai Motor India’s record US$3 3 billion IPO in 2024 The fund-raising will be used to retire the company’s debts.

matched_articles.title: Kia India sales up 19% at 24,552 units in June
matched_articles.summary: Kia 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Kia India sales up 19% at 24,552 units in June'이다. Kia India has achieved its highest-ever June sales, reporting a 19% wholesale growth to 24,552 units. The first half of 2026 also marked a record, with 1,63,749 units dispatched, a 15. 2% increase year-on-year. This success is attributed to strong demand for models like the Seltos, Sonet, and Carens Clavis, with the new Syros also garnering positive customer reception. ET Online Kia India has achieved its highest-ever June sales, reporting a 19% wholesale growth to 24,552 units New Delhi: Automaker Kia India on Wednesday reported a 19 per cent growth in wholesale at 24,552 units in June 2026, over 20,625 units sold in June last year The automaker said this was its "highest-ever June sales" since entering the market Also Read: Major automakers record strong June sales on steady domestic demand, rising exports During the first six months of 2026, Kia India dispatched 1,63,749 units, its strongest-ever performance for the first-half (January-June), registering a 15 Atul Sood, Senior Vice President, Sales & Marketing at Kia India, said, "Closing the first half of the year at a record high with best-ever June sales is a significant milestone for Kia India and reflects the trust customers continue to place in our brand This performance has been driven by the sustained demand for the new Seltos, Sonet as well as Carens Clavis, while MY26 Syros has also received an encouraging response from customers". 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

Hyundai Motor India posts total sales of 51,335 units in June This includes domestic sales of 39,635 units and exports of 11,700 units By PTI Updated - July 01, 2026 at 12:15 PM thehindubusinessline com/companies/hyundai-motor-india-posts-total-sales-of-51335-units-in-june/article71169010 ece Hyundai Motor India Ltd (HMIL) on Wednesday reported total monthly sales of 51,335 units in June 2026 This includes domestic sales of 39,635 units and exports of 11,700 units, HMIL said in a regulatory filing. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Chairwoman of South Korea’s Shinsegae Group becomes billionaire amid AI boom
matched_articles.summary: Shinsegae 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Chairwoman of South Korea’s Shinsegae Group becomes billionaire amid AI boom'이다. Chung Yoo-kyung, chairwoman of Shinsegae Group, has become a billionaire as the South Korean department store operator benefits from the AI boom despite having no direct ties to the technology. Chung, 53, is Shinsegae's largest shareholder The AI-driven rally has boosted the wealth of retail investors, who are now spending more on luxury goods like those sold at Shinsegae, a trend analysts say has supported the group’s shares The group operates 13 department stores across South Korea, including its flagship Shinsegae Gangnam and the Shinsegae Centum City in Busan, the world's largest department store with a floor area of 293,905 square meters Myung-hee last year said transferred her remaining 10% stake in Shinsegae to Chung as part of a leadership transition at the group, according to The Business of Fashion Chung’s older brother, Chung Yong-jin, received Myung-hee’s remaining shares in discount retailer E-Mart. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
